prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年厦门大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约10279名、14496名、33137名（2023年出现异常大幅后移，可能与当年专业组调整或大小年波动有关 ）、13666名、4768名。2025年位次较2024年大幅前移约8898名，反弹明显，近两年波动剧烈。2025年基准位次约4768名；2021–2025年该校在海南省综合类计划 招生人数分别为54、54、56、56、56人，2025年计划56人。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 厦门大学是985工程、211工程、国家双一流建设高校（A类），软科中国大学排名2026年位列第25名，近年排名稳定在24–26名区间，属于国内顶尖综合性大学；2026年高考周期声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及校园安全（盗摄、偷盗）、学校管理（复试歧视本科背景）、录取断档（招生自2017年持续恶化）等信号。抖音热度总排名第 5（综合热度1060万），评价"高热"，短视频平台关注度极高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 厦门大学位于福建省（邻省），海南省考生对东南沿海高校有较强地域偏好；该校在 海南省招生计划近年稳定在54–56人，占比较小但稳定；声誉负面可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制，但高热关注度反映整体报考热度不低；第五轮 学科评估中，厦门大学拥有化学A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A+、统计学A+、工商管理A、应用经济学A、法学A-、数学A-等14个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信类为"高热推荐"，电气工程及其自动化"高热推荐"，临床医学"推荐"，法学"分化观望"。厦门大学 在经管、法学、海洋科学等领域的强势学科与当前热门专业方向高度契合。海南省考生总数从2025年67408人增至2026年约78000人（+15.7%），竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的反弹趋势、2026年海南省考生总数显著增加（+15.7%）带来的竞争加剧、学 校抖音高热关注度与声誉负面信号的相互抵消，以及招生计划持平，预计2026年厦门大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次在2025年4768名基础上继续小幅前移（更难进）。预测最低 位次约4738名，波动区间4238–5238名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在4738名附近，区间4238–5238名。建议位次在区间上限（5238名）以外的考生以三档专业为主力保底选择，位次在区间中段（4738名附近）的考生以二档专业为主、三 档保底，位次在区间下限（4238名）以内的考生可重点冲击一档王牌专业（法学、会计学、经济学类）。厦门大学马来西亚分校专业录取位次通常低于本部，可作为低分段考生的 备选。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xiamen University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 10279, 14496, 33137 (an abnormal large backward shift in 2023, possibly related to major group adjustments or size-year fluctuations that year), 13666, and 4768. In 2025, the ranking significantly moved forward by about 8898 places compared to 2024, showing a clear rebound and drastic fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4768; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for this university in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were 54, 54, 56, 56, and 56 respectively, with 56 planned for 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and National Double First-Class Construction University (Category A). In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 25th, with stable rankings in the 24–26 range in recent years, belonging to top-tier comprehensive universities in China. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', mainly involving campus safety (voyeurism, theft), school management (discrimination against undergraduate background in re-examination), and admission gaps (enrollment has been continuously deteriorating since 2017). The overall popularity on Douyin ranks 5th (comprehensive popularity 10.6 million), rated as 'high heat', with extremely high attention on short video platforms.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (neighboring province), and Hainan Province candidates have a strong regional preference for southeastern coastal universities. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province has been stable at 54–56 people in recent years, a small but stable proportion. Negative reputation may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply, but high attention reflects overall application enthusiasm is not low. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xiamen University has 14 A- and above disciplines including Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Law A-, Mathematics A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates. 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are 'high heat recommended', Electrical Engineering and Automation 'high heat recommended', Clinical Medicine 'recommended', Law 'differentiated wait-and-see'. Xiamen University's strong disciplines in economics and management, law, marine science, etc., are highly aligned with current popular major directions. The total number of candidates in Hainan Province increased from 67,408 in 2025 to about 78,000 in 2026 (+15.7%), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend of the significant forward shift in 2025 ranking, the intensified competition due to a notable increase in Hainan Province candidates in 2026 (+15.7%), the mutual offset of the university's high Douyin attention and negative reputation signals, and the unchanged enrollment plan, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Xiamen University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category in 2026 will continue to move slightly forward (harder to enter) based on the 2025 ranking of 4768. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4738, with a fluctuation range of 4238–5238.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law (including International Rule of Law Talent Base Experimental Class)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Auditing, including Dual Degree Program)
- Economics (including Finance, Public Finance, Taxation, etc., including Dual Degree Program)
- Journalism and Communication (International Communication, Smart Advertising and Digital News)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Business Administration (including Human Resource Management, Business Administration, Marketing, Tourism Management)
- Chemistry (including Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, Chemical Biology, Chemical Measurement and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace, including Dual Degree Program)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Materials)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medical Health, including Biological Sciences, Biotechnology, Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine, Medical Laboratory Technology)
- Science Experimental Class (Marine and Ecological Environment, including Marine Science, Marine Technology, Environmental Science, Ecology)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Xiamen University Malaysia Campus)
- Artificial Intelligence (Xiamen University Malaysia Campus)
- Electronic Information Engineering (Xiamen University Malaysia Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 4738, with a range of 4238–5238. It is recommended that candidates with rankings above the upper limit of the range (5238) mainly choose Tier 3 majors as safety options; candidates with rankings around the middle of the range (4738) mainly choose Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as backup; candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (4238) can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors (Law, Accounting, Economics). Majors at Xiamen University Malaysia Campus typically have lower admission rankings than the main campus and can serve as alternatives for low-scoring candidates.
